englishDefinitions: a situation in which you accept the disadvantages of one choice in order to get the advantages of another
to exchange one benefit or feature for another
persianTranslation: دادن چیزی در برابر چیز دیگر
فدا کردن یک مزیت برای مزیت دیگر
examples: There is always a trade-off between speed and safety.
They traded off comfort for lower costs.
Choosing this job means accepting some trade-offs.
